title: After you apply – GST/HST rebate – Ontario First Nations point-of-sale relief - Canada.ca
content:
GST/HST rebate – Ontario First Nations point-of-sale relief
Form GST189 – Reason code 23

## Change a processed application
If you want to change a processed rebate application, you can submit a reassessment request to the CRA with the following information:
- Reason for your request including any new or additional information
Reassessment requests for rebates under reason code 23 may be mailed to one of the following tax centres:
- If your address is in Ontario Sudbury Tax Centre GST/HST Rebates Processing 1050 Notre Dame Avenue Sudbury ON  P3A 5C1
Sudbury Tax Centre GST/HST Rebates Processing 1050 Notre Dame Avenue Sudbury ON  P3A 5C1
- If your address is not in Ontario Prince Edward Island Tax Centre GST/HST Rebates Processing 275 Pope Road Summerside PE  C1N 6A2
Prince Edward Island Tax Centre GST/HST Rebates Processing 275 Pope Road Summerside PE  C1N 6A2
GST/HST registrants may submit reassessment requests that do not contain supporting documents, through My Business Account or Represent a Client, by selecting “Submit a written enquiry” within the “Enquires service” option.
To access My Business Account or Represent a Client, go to Sign in to your CRA account and sign in or register for a CRA account.

## What records to keep
You must keep all documents and other records to support your rebate application for six years from the end of the year to which they relate. If you want to destroy your records earlier, you have to send the CRA a written request and wait for written approval to do so.
Learn more: GST/HST Memorandum 15-1 , General Requirements for Books and Records

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
